object_a.label: stove
object_a.description: built-in oven/stove unit in kitchen back-right
object_a.long_form_open_description: A stainless steel oven/stove integrated into the kitchen cabinetry along the right side of the back wall. Range hood or microwave may be above it; unit blends with other stainless appliances.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Located within the cabinet run to the right of the refrigerator and behind the island
